blocks.content: A petite woman with a hood arrived at the square overlooking the Vatican.
Candler Eden.
Named after an ancient city, she was a Yora who practiced love.
Eden removed her hood and gazed at the top of the towering spire.

blocks.speaker: Eden
blocks.content: That's not it.
Slowly lowering her gaze, she passed the entrance of the Vatican and sensed the unseen underground.

blocks.speaker: Eden
blocks.content: Underground.
The faint but distinct smell of evil lingered, noticeable only with concentration.

blocks.speaker: Eden
blocks.content: My feeling was right. But why is such an aura lurking in the Vatican?
After hearing Havitz's inner voice through Nemesis, Eden had been plagued by nightmares.
One day, while chasing demons with Dante, she heard a strange rumor.

blocks.speaker: Eden
blocks.content: Satanism.
The founder was Giyorgi, a demon surprisingly formed from Yahweh's discarded emotions.
After parting ways with Dante, she investigated Satanism, and the trail of evil led her here.

blocks.speaker: Eden
blocks.content: The Vatican.
The Lami faith upholds the will of good.
Holy Knights made significant contributions in the war against demons, and priests cared for the needy.
Leaving countless questions behind, Eden pulled her hood back on.

blocks.speaker: Eden
blocks.content: I will confirm it with my own eyes.
She would destroy Satanism, the spiritual foundation of Satan, and escape her dreadful nightmares.

blocks.speaker: Eden
blocks.content: Oh, Yora.
She kissed the cross pendant within a circular frame and headed towards the Vatican.

blocks.speaker: Eden
blocks.content: Protect me.
This way.
The head priest who guided Shirone's group to the Pope's office still looked uneasy.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: What are you planning?
The Lami faith, Yora faith, and Teraphos faith were the world's three major religions.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: The Yora faith doesn't expand its organization, and the Teraphos faith fell along with the Teraphos Vatican. A few radicals cause terror, but it's not at a dangerous level.
Only the Lami faith remained steadfast in these turbulent times.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: This is proof that Cria created the universe. But since when…
The name Yahweh began to spread rapidly, beyond control.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: We should have nipped it in the bud from the start.
Once the leading nation of the world was decided at this Holy War, the Pope of the Lami faith would certify it.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: A chance to become the world's only religion.
At the cusp of this unprecedented achievement, Yahweh had come to the Vatican.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: Once again, please behave reverently before the Pope. If you speak carelessly because you believe in a different god, the Lami faith will act according to its doctrine.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Hmph! Anyway, those Holy Knights…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Neide.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I understand. It will be a short conversation. If I get the answer I want, I'll leave quietly.
The head priest grew even more anxious.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: What answer does he seek?
Lingering in front of the Pope's office wasn't a good look, so he knocked politely.

blocks.speaker: Head Priest
blocks.content: Pope, you have visitors.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: Let them in.
A deep voice followed by the door opening revealed the kind-looking Constantine.

blocks.speaker: Constantine
blocks.content: So you are the philanthropist of the era, Yahweh. I've heard the rumors, but you look much younger in person.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I've heard of your reputation as well. You've greatly aided in the war against demons. Thank you.
Constantine offered a seat.

blocks.speaker: Constantine
blocks.content: There's no need for thanks. Compared to what you've done, it's nothing. Please, sit.
As Shirone sat, he thought.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He doesn't seem to crave honor. Well… he was never like that even in his youth.
He knew about Constantine's younger days through Omega.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Pope of Strength.
Constantine's divine power was among the strongest in the Vatican.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He's not someone who would be swayed by evil. So why do I feel…
The smell of Satan here?

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: So, Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: You wanted to see me before the Holy War. Do I not meet your standards?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I have no right to judge others. I'm just curious about something.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: Is that so? A bit disappointing.
Having lived his life without shame, Shirone's answer felt unsatisfactory to him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright, ask anything. As you know, I must leave for the Holy War soon.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: What are you hiding?
At the direct question, the Pope closed his mouth but his expression remained steady.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hmm. What am I hiding? From you? Let's see… what could I be hiding?
As he walked around the room, the Pope looked back at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: When I was a child, I broke a friend's toy and didn't confess. Ah, during my adolescence, I had a crush on the girl next door. Not something a servant of God should do, but I had impure thoughts. And…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It doesn't matter.
Humans are swayed by desires. What I want to know is more fundamental.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Holy Code.
The Pope's eyebrows twitched.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: The martyr code. I heard that Lami faith's Holy Knights are trained from a very young age.

blocks.speaker: Constantine
blocks.content: Yahweh, I tried to understand you. But why do you question our doctrine?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm not questioning it, I'm asking. Don't you think it's wrong? You remember breaking a friend's toy clearly, but why don't you mention this?

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: Because it's not wrong.

blocks.speaker: Constantine
blocks.content: The Lami faith has fought against evil. The Holy Knights are at the forefront of that battle. What's wrong with training them? I don't know why you're nitpicking, but as the Pope of the Lami faith, I have no doubts about our doctrine.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then I can't accept the Lami faith.
As the Pope's face contorted further, the furniture shook as if an earthquake had struck.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Amazing.
Despite being a force against evil, his power affected even the indifferent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Most demons would be crushed by this.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: Creating a peaceful world is our shared goal, isn't it? Why are you doing this? Do you think I should follow your methods too?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I know all of history before I was born. Of course, that includes the Lami faith.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: It doesn't matter what god you believe in. Religion exists for humanity. But the Holy Knights are different. They're not a religion. What the Lami faith has done to them is…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Brainwashing.
Perhaps the Pope wasn't an exception either.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They undergo harsh training, mentally arm themselves, and use their powerful divine power to defeat evil. Isn't that how the Lami faith has grown?

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: We've saved countless people. We've protected the world from evil. Is that so wrong?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The biggest mistake is making them incapable of thinking it's wrong. That's brainwashing.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: Humans are weak!
The Pope shouted.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Has brought evil to this holy place.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: …What do you mean?
Evil in the Vatican?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Humans are weak. Easily swayed by desires. But if you try to suppress it forcibly, you fall into greater temptation. It nurtures evil.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: Now I understand.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Don't go to the Holy War.
Shirone was firm.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Stay here and confirm the evil the Lami faith has brought in. That's the right course.

blocks.speaker: Pope
blocks.content: It's time.
As if blocking his ears, Constantine ignored Shirone's words.

blocks.speaker: Constantine
blocks.content: Your plan has failed. I'm going to the Holy War to work for the world. If you join me, we can be good friends. But if you try to tarnish the Lami faith for your gain, I'll fight you with my honor and conviction.
The door closed with a thud.
The three left in the Pope's office were tense, unable to reflect on the conversation.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: …It's intense.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: The killing intent was palpable from outside the door.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: If we delay, they'll storm in. What do we do? Fight or flee?

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: We can't leave now.
Shirone stood up.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I know the Pope's stance, but I need to confirm it myself. What's happening in the Vatican?

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Is there really evil here? The Pope didn't seem to notice.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: It's the Vatican. Detecting evil is like a seesaw of law. You adapt to the temperature if you're in water for a long time, but a newcomer feels it as hot or cold.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Being an outsider makes you more sensitive.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Yes. And the stronger the evil, the fainter its aura. It's cunning. Havitz isn't even detectable.
There was a knock.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Come out now. The Pope has left for the Holy War, so there's no reason to stay.
Iruki activated Spirit Zone.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Seven.
The magic restriction device was no problem for him, even hacking the hidden code of the abyss.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Don't make a big scene. If word spreads that Shirone caused trouble in another sect, public opinion at the Holy War will worsen.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: But we can't just take it. As long as we don't kill them, right?

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: …Well, for now.
With permission, Neide lowered his center of gravity, ready to charge.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Going? Really going?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright!
As the door shattered, six blades came in from all sides.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Expected this.
Neide's body, enveloped in lightning, dodged the attacks with superhuman reflexes.

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: Capture them!
Among the Holy Knights on special duty were Leon and Seina from the patrol team.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: Eliminate the heretics!
Their killing intent pushed Neide, who had been holding back, to his limit.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: These guys…
Boom!
The lightning of Thunder God surged, breaking the ceiling and sweeping the corridor.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!
The powerful lightning made the Holy Knights tremble, gripping their swords.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Neide!
Regaining his senses, Neide quickly adjusted his power.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Oops.
Thunder God was powerful but had the drawback of losing control the longer it was maintained.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Now! Let's go!
While the Holy Knights were still in shock, Shirone's group ran in the opposite direction.

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: Damn it!
Leon punched the floor.

blocks.speaker: Leon
blocks.content: Summon all the paladins of the Oracle Management Department. We can't let them leave the Vatican.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Hehehe, no need for that.
At the eerie voice from behind, the seven Holy Knights turned quickly.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Hehehehe. Hehehe.
A man with lips torn to his ears, holding twin scythes, laughed maniacally.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: The Laughing Man.
The most secretive organization in the Vatican.

blocks.speaker: Seina
blocks.content: The Heresy Management Department.
